content: Just shipped my first open source project! 🚀 Been working on it for months. Check it out and let me know what you think.
Beautiful sunset at the beach today. Sometimes you just need to unplug and enjoy the moment. 🌅
Hot take: tabs are better than spaces. Change my mind.
Working on a new UI design system. Clean, minimal, accessible. Can't wait to share it with you all! ✨
Just tried making homemade ramen from scratch. Took 6 hours but absolutely worth it 🍜
Reading 'Clean Code' again for the third time. Always find something new. What's a book you re-read regularly?
Monday motivation: the best time to start was yesterday. The second best time is now. Let's go! 💪
Finally got my dark mode design looking perfect. Light mode users, I don't understand you 😄
